untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based entry/exit (last day of April, last day of July) and a 5-year lookback high-low range comparison. The allowed indicators do not include multi-year historical extrema or calendar date functions. price_pos_20 only provides 20-period positioning; a 5-year (1,260+ trading day) Donchian channel or similar would be needed but is not available. Additionally, month/day-of-month conditional logic is not expressible in the structured condition format.
translation_notes: Attempted to use price_pos_20 as proxy for lower 50% threshold, but this only covers 20 periods, not 5 years. The signal fundamentally requires time-based triggers (calendar months) and multi-year reference ranges that cannot be represented with the available indicator set. Hold period (92 days ≈ April 30 to July 31) is approximate.
